user.title: Filen
user.description: Connect your Filen account to expose account and storage sensors.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Filen
reauth_confirm.description: Enter your Filen password and, if enabled, a current two-factor code. One-time two-factor codes are not stored.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid Filen credentials or two-factor code.

abort.already_configured: This Filen account is already configured.
